experience_chunks.description: Frontend engineering at a media company at Accenture.
Android mobile development using Java and (more recently) Kotlin at a consumer-app company at Pied Piper.

Test automation and QA engineering for a fintech product at CRED.

Built and maintained multiple production features for Android mobile applications, including shopping flow, push notification system, and offline-first sync layer.
Mixed data science and analytics-engineering role at a marketing-analytics startup at Wipro.

Built and maintained data pipelines on Apache Airflow processing ~500GB of daily transactional data across 12 source systems at Swiggy.
